Features by Platform - DWSIM - Open Source Chemical Process Simulator
Features by Platform
From DWSIM - Open Source Chemical Process Simulator
Jump to navigation
Jump to search
The following table displays DWSIM features by platform as of November 5, 2020.
Classic UI
(Windows/Linux)
Cross-Platform UI
(Windows/Linux/macOS)
Android/iOS
Dynamic Modeling

Yes
Yes
No
